...
- Battleship - 5 contributions
    This was the final project for our advanced C# class - a group project where the students were to create a single-player Battleship-type game according to project requirements. I served as project manager and lead developer/designer for our team of three programmers, creating the top-level design of the project and coding out the functional portions of the game. The other two developers developed the UI portions of the project  This project was a success in that our group created a functional game that met all of the requirements set forth by the instructor. We came very close to creating a more advanced AI that would enable the computer "player" to hone in on a target after the hit, rather than striking at random. I would have liked to have had time to generate some more advanced graphics, but we were short on time, and it was outside the scope of the project requirements anyway. Now that I have a much better grasp of good programming practices, I would have opted not to hard-code the individual instances of the ships, and instead generated those within the game class.

...
### AI Lease Explorer POC
...
In this POC, we leveraged Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search (formerly Azure Cognitive Search), and other tooling to explore the possibility of breaking down a commercial lease document into searchable sections capable of being vectorized and indexed as a basis for AI interaction using the RAG pattern. We successfully constructed the POC level ingestion pipeline and progressed on validating the RAG pattern tooling until the project was paused due to resource reallocation. The learning was valuable and the approach had strong potential. Show less
...
### AI Chat POC
...
In this POC we leveraged Microsoft OpenAI and Semantic Kernel to explore the capabilities of a curated AI chat experience. While the POC resulted in valuable learning, we determined there were challenges and risk concerns from the business. Additionally, the functionality overlapped too greatly with road-mapping for Microsoft Copilot.

As the Lead Intelligence Analyst at the Simon Operational Intelligence Center, now through Simon Property Group, I head a talented team of seven analysts dedicated to strategic intelligence, data analysis, and risk management. Leveraging collective expertise, I specialize in converting intricate datasets into actionable insights for key stakeholders at Simon, thereby facilitating informed decision-making and strategic planning. In my role, I am responsible for orchestrating and directing comprehensive intelligence operations and analyses to support and enhance the organization's objectives. My approach ensures that our intelligence efforts are aligned with Simon's broader strategic goals, driving efficiencies and enabling proactive risk management. By fostering a collaborative environment, I maximize the team's potential to gather, validate, and interpret critical information. Transformative, strategic leader with a record of identifying unmet needs and delivering state-of-the-art innovations and technology to grow revenue and profitability in the retail real estate industry. Leverage data and analytical abilities to drive new business, develop effective programs, and provide unique services and experiences. Skilled at forging strategic partnerships and negotiating with Fortune 500 firms to create value for retail (eCommerce, shopping center, and brick and mortar) customers, employees, and investors. High-Impact Results: ⇒Built Simon’s Innovation Group, a first for the industry. ⇒Instrumental in founding and growing Simon Venture Group, the industry’s first corporate ventures group. ⇒Generated significant incremental advertising revenue for Simon Brand Ventures. ⇒Enabled physical returns for online ecommerce, generating incremental trips to properties & incremental sales. ⇒Pioneered an outlet ecommerce site, shoppremiumoutlets.com (SPO.com). ⇒Launched Guest Services chatbot within Facebook Messenger improving NPS scores 15 points. ⇒Turned properties into mini-distribution centers and Retail 2.0 services, saving retailers millions of dollars. ⇒Drove significant cost savings while improving NPS scores for Procter & Gamble (P&G) accounts. Core Competencies: • Startup Situations • Complex Negotiations • Customer Experience • Strategic Partnerships • Process Optimization • B2B / B2C • New Business Development • Budget / P&L Management • Program Development • Business Intelligence • Cost Savings • Team Leadership
...
#### Senior Vice President, Innovation & Customer Experience (Current)
...
►Promoted to lead operations for innovation, customer experience, loyalty programming, customer intelligence, new business development, and strategic partnerships. ►Deployed industry-leading shopper traffic platform to 25 properties, providing Customer Intelligence on shoppers’ needs and wants. ►Developed guest services training program that improved NPS from mystery shoppers 20 points. ►Created and launched industry’s first proprietary loyalty program for malls, Simon Insider. ►Created industry-first on-mall augmented reality and virtual reality game in 8 weeks, launching scavenger hunt concept for Holiday 2017. Show less

## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
As a Software Engineer on the Shopping Ads team, you will be an "AI First" engineer dedicated to solving complex issues using Generative AI . You will design, implement, and launch innovative Large Language Model (LLM) and Machine Learning (ML) systems to enhance the shopping journey for users worldwide.
...
### Responsibilities
...
* Write product or system development code. 
* Collaborate with peers and stakeholders through design and code reviews to ensure best practices amongst available technologies (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency).
...
* Execute and analyze A/B experiments to evaluate performance and ensure long-term value.
...
* Triage product or system issues and debug/track/resolve by analyzing
...
impact on hardware, network, or
...
operations and quality
...
* Design, implement, and launch Large Language Models and Machine Learning systems.### Minimum qualifications:
...
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience programming in Python or C++.
* 1 year of experience with applied machine learning.
* 1 year of experience building or using large-scale, production quality Machine Learning (ML) systems.### Preferred qualifications:
...
* Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science, or a technical area related to Applied AI/ML engineering.
* 2 years of experience with data structures and algorithms.
* Experience developing accessible technologies.

• Experiência sólida com Python e SQL. • Experiência em Machine Learning (modelos supervisionados e não supervisionados). • Experiência prática com IA Generativa, LLMs e arquiteturas RAG. • Experiência com LangChain e/ou LangGraph. • Conhecimento em bancos vetoriais, como OpenSearch. • Experiência com Pandas, Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow e/ou PyTorch. • Experiência em ambientes Cloud (AWS e/ou Azure). • Conhecimento em métricas de avaliação de modelos e sistemas de IA. • Experiência com AWS Bedrock e OpenAI. • Conhecimento em Azure Document Intelligence. • Experiência com Visão Computacional. • Conhecimento em MLOps e monitoramento de modelos. • Experiência com aplicações distribuídas, conteinerização e arquiteturas serverless. • Vivência em metodologias ágeis, como Scrum e Kanban.

Meet HII's Mission Technologies Division
- Our team of more than 7,000 professionals worldwide delivers all-domain expertise and advanced technologies in service of mission partners across the globe. Mission Technologies is leading the next evolution of national defense - the data evolution - by accelerating a breadth of national security solutions for government and commercial customers. Our capabilities range from C5ISR, AI and Big Data, cyber operations and synthetic training environments to fleet sustainment, environmental remediation and the largest family of unmanned underwater vehicles in every class. Find the role that's right for you. Apply today. We look forward to meeting you.

HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team's office in Annapolis Junction, MD.
